subject: Potential report completed: {player}
body:
The potential assessment for {player} has been completed.

{player} has a revealed potential of {potential}. This gives us a clearer picture of their long-term development prospects.

es.subject: Informe de potencial completado: {player}
es.body:
La evaluación de potencial de {player} ha sido completada.

{player} tiene un potencial revelado de {potential}. Esto nos da una imagen más clara de sus perspectivas de desarrollo a largo plazo.
